initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    date_dim.d_year, 
    date_dim.d_moy, 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
GROUP BY 
    date_dim.d_year, 
    date_dim.d_moy
ORDER BY 
    date_dim.d_year, 
    date_dim.d_moy
LIMIT 100
